examples: Neuropathic pain is driven by nerves gone wrong.
But except for some rare inherited conditions, there has been no evidence that genetics contributed to the risk of neuropathic pain in humans.
Further, the mutant mice proved more sensitive than normal mice to inflammatory pain and neuropathic pain, two common forms of chronic pain in humans.
They used a surgical technique to damage the spinal cord of rats and induce neuropathic pain.
Lyrica was supposed to come out of the box with unprecedented approvals for neuropathic pain, and also for epilepsy.
